title_en: 1. Allaahum-maghfir lahu war hamhu вҖҳaafihee waвҖҳfu вҖҳanhu wa akrim nuzulahu
content_en: wa wassiвҖҳ madkhalah, [Oh Allaah forgive him, have mercy on him, make him well, overlook his faults, make his place of rest a noble place and expand (the door of)his entrance (into paradise);] waghsil-hu bil-maa wath-thalj wal-barad wa naqqihu minal-khataayaa kamaa yunnaqath-thawbul-abyadu minad-danas [wash him with water, snow and hail and purify him of his sins the way a white cloth is purified of dirt,] wa abdilhu daaran khayran min daarih wa ahlah khayran min ablih wa zawjan khayran min zawjih [replace his home with a better home, his family with a better family and his wife with a better wife;] wa adkhilhul-jan-nah wa aвҖҳoothu-hu min вҖҳathaabil-qabr wa min вҖҳathaabin-naar. [put him in Paradise and give him refuge from the punishment of the grave and the fire.]64 63 Sunan Abu Dawud, vol.2, p.909, no.3193, Sunan Ibn-i-Majah, vol.2, p.393, no.1497, Mishkat Al-Masabih, vol.1, p.351 and authenticated in sahih Sunan Abee Daawood, vol.2, pp.616-7, no.2740. 64 Reported by Aboo Hurayrah in Sahih Muslim, vol.2, pp.456-7, nos. 2104 & 2106, Sunan Ibn-iMajah, vol.2, pp.394-5, no.1500 and Mishkat Al-Masabih, vol.1, p.348. 2 о Ёп»Ўо ЎЩҖ пәҚп»ҹп» пұ п»¬ о ўп»Ҙо   п»Өо Ёп»Ўо Ўп»Ҹп№¶пәҺпәҢЩҗпә’Щҗп»Ёп№¶пәҺ пәҚп»ҹп» пұ п»¬о  пәёп№¶пәҺп»«Щҗпә©Щҗп»Ёп№¶пәҺ п»ӯо  пәғЩҸп»Ёп№ҫпәңп№¶пәҺп»Ёп№¶пәҺ п»ӯо  пә«п№¶п»ңп№¶пәӯЩҗп»Ёп№¶пәҺ п»ӯо  п»ңп№¶пә’Щҗп»ҙпәӯЩҗп»Ёп№¶пәҺ п»ӯо  п»җЩҗп»ҙпәӯЩҗп»Ёп№¶пәҺ п»ӯо  пәјо  пәҳЩҗп»Ёп№¶пәҺ п»ӯо ¬п»ҙо  п»Өо  п»Ёп№¶пәҺ п»ӯо ¬п»ҙо   п»ҹЩҗпәӨо ў пәҚп»Ҹп№ҫп»”Щҗпәӯ пәӯЩҗо ў п»»п№¶ пәҳп№¶пәӨо Ёп»Ўо Ўп» п№¶пәҺп»ЎЩҗ пәҚп»ҹп» пұ п»¬о ўп» п№¶п»° пәҚп№ҫп»№Щҗпәҙо   п»Ӣо Ўп»“пұ п»Әо   п»ӨЩҗп»Ёпұ пәҺ п»“п№¶пәҳп№¶п»ӯо Ўпәҳп№¶п»Әо ўп»“пұ п»ҙо   пәҳп№¶п»ӯо ўп»Ҙо  п»Өо  пәҺп»ҘЩҗ п»ӯо  п» п№¶п»° пәҚп№ҫп»№Щҗп»ҙп»Өо  п»ҙЩҗп»ӘЩҗ п»Ӣо ў п»ӨЩҗп»Ёпұ пәҺ п»“п№¶пә„ЩҺпәӨо Ўпәҳп№¶п»Әо ўп»ҙо  п»ҙо ўпәғЩҺпәӨ п»»п№¶ о   п»ӯо Ўп»©о  пәӯо ўп»Ёп№¶пәҺ пәғЩҺпә о ўп»Ө о Ўп»©о  пә©о ўп»Ңо  пәҳп№ёп»ҖЩҗп» пұ п»Ёп№¶пәҺ пә’ .
title_id: 1. Allahummaghfir lahu warhamhu 'aafihee wa'fu 'anhu wa akrim nuzulahu
content_id:
wa wassi' madkhalah (Ya Allah, ampunilah dia, kasihanilah dia, sehatkanlah dia, maafkanlah kesalahannya, muliakanlah tempat istirahatnya dan lapangkanlah (pintu) masuknya (ke surga);) waghsilhu bil-maa' wath-thalj wal-barad wa naqqihi minal-khataaya kama yunnaqath-thawbul-abyadu minad-danas (mandikanlah dia dengan air, salju, dan hujan es, serta sucikanlah dia dari dosa-dosanya sebagaimana kain putih disucikan dari kotoran,) wa abdilhu daaran khairan min daarih wa ahlan khairan min ahlih wa zawjan khairan min zawjih (gantikanlah rumahnya dengan rumah yang lebih baik, keluarganya dengan keluarga yang lebih baik, dan istrinya dengan istri yang lebih baik;) wa adkhilhul-jannah wa a'idhuhu min 'adzaabil-qabr wa min 'adzaabin-naar (masukkan dia ke dalam surga dan lindungilah dia dari azab kubur dan azab neraka.)

Doa kedua: Allahummaghfir lihayyina wa mayyitina wa syahidina wa ghaibina wa shaghirina wa kabirina wa dzakarina wa untsana (Ya Allah, ampunilah orang-orang yang masih hidup di antara kami dan yang telah meninggal, yang hadir dan yang tidak hadir, yang muda dan yang tua, laki-laki dan perempuan kami.)
